# FileBox

class="a-s">&quot;#000000&quot;</span><span class="a-p">,</span><span> </span><span class="a-pr">stroke_width</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">2</span><span> data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::FileBox;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        FileBox { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
box, package, model

files
